decision_commentary: Completeness 5: 3 bids received (exceeds minimum 2 for rubric; meets commercial_health_center SOW minimum of 3). All bids have contractor name, total, line_items (7 scope items each), timeline, notes, and clinical_experience field. recommendation and recommendation_rationale both present. Accuracy 5: recommendation rationale goes well beyond lowest price — COFEPRIS track record in BCS specifically cited ('4 prior COFEPRIS-regulated healthcare projects in BCS and Sonora — the most locally relevant experience'), COFEPRIS-certified medical gas subcontractor cited, timeline (shortest at 78 weeks) cited. Bid spread is only 4.3% (USD 1,840,000 to USD 1,920,000) — market pricing consistency noted. Clarity 5: Marcela can select Constructora Clínica del Pacífico immediately. All three bids itemized identically making comparison straightforward. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: comparison produced after executive plans approved (DG-11 timestamp 2026-12-01, executive plans DG-10 timestamp 2026-11-20 — correct sequence). Decision_readiness 5: Marcela's DG-11 comment confirms 'Approve Constructora Clínica del Pacífico — COFEPRIS experience in BCS is the deciding factor' — matrix supported that decision. Auto-fail: not a single bid treated as final — PASS; comparison matrix present — PASS.
celia_routing_notes: DG-11: decision=approve, route_to=Paco (initiate permit submission). Comment preserved verbatim. All 11 payload fields present.
